name: Tecnología / Software
description: Productos de software, SaaS, aplicaciones móviles, plataformas tecnológicas y startups tech.

biz_evaluator.context: Evaluate from a tech startup lens: TAM/SAM/SOM for software markets, technical feasibility, scalability, and defensible moats (IP, network effects, switching costs).

software_architect.context: Propose architecture for scale: cloud-native, microservices vs monolith trade-offs, API design, data storage strategy, security-first design, and tech stack selection.

product_manager.context: Define MVP scope, user stories, product roadmap phases (0-3-6-12 months), success KPIs, and PLG vs sales-led growth model recommendation.

brand_guardian.context: Build a tech brand: developer trust, thought leadership positioning, open source community potential, and differentiation against established SaaS players.

growth_hacker.context: Focus on product-led growth (PLG), viral loops, developer communities, Product Hunt launches, freemium/free-trial funnels, and referral programs.

marketing_strategist.context: B2B/B2C SaaS marketing: content marketing, SEO, developer relations, G2/Capterra review strategy, LinkedIn demand gen, and webinar-based pipeline building.

sales_lead.context: SaaS sales motion: self-serve, inside sales, enterprise sales cycles, demo-to-trial-to-paid conversion, expansion revenue (upsell/cross-sell), and annual contract value growth.

cfo_finance.context: SaaS metrics: ARR/MRR, CAC, LTV, churn, burn rate, runway, and unit economics. Funding strategy: bootstrapped vs VC-backed paths and when to raise.

legal_expert.context: Software IP, open source licenses, data privacy (GDPR, CCPA), SaaS customer agreements, SOC2/ISO27001 compliance roadmap, and employment contracts for remote teams.

cxo_designer.context: UX/product design: user research, wireframing, design system, accessibility (WCAG 2.1), mobile-first responsive design, and design-to-development handoff.

customer_success.context: Onboarding flows, activation metrics, health scores, churn prediction signals, NPS tracking, customer education programs, and expansion playbooks.

competitor_analyst.context: Tech competitor matrix: feature comparison, pricing models, market positioning maps, developer ecosystem strength, funding history, and acquisition risk assessment.
